location: Guaranteed, one-time drop from the Black Knight enemy inside the Church of Consolation, a ruined church on the eastern edge of Gravesite Plain (south of the Suppressing Pillar).
tactics: From the Gravesite Plain Site of Grace, head east/southeast along the road to the Church of Consolation.
The Black Knight patrols near the Marika statue inside; other Messmer Soldiers and a Rotten Stray are nearby, but only this specific Black Knight drops the hammer and he does not respawn once killed.
His dangerous attack is an overhead hammer slam that leaves a delayed holy-damage AOE burst on the ground a beat after impact — back off after the slam instead of punishing immediately.
Don't confuse this fight with other Black Knights elsewhere in the DLC (e.g. ones dropping Black Knight armor/shield) — this hammer is exclusive to the Church of Consolation knight.
lore: This black-steel warhammer, trimmed in gold, belongs to the Black Knights who serve Messmer the Impaler. It carries a blessing from an Erdtree incantation, so giving it a holy affinity further amplifies that power, and its guard counter releases a delayed burst of holy light that staggers anything caught in it.

builds.name: Strength/Faith Crusher
builds.why: C-scaling Strength paired with D-scaling Faith layers holy damage onto its high physical output, and the guard counter's holy explosion scales with Faith, rewarding a hybrid investment.

builds.name: Pure Strength Poise-Breaker
builds.why: 140 base physical AR and Strike damage type make it a strong stagger weapon on Strength investment alone, without needing to fund the Faith requirement.
